utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , I want to look too ! . Yikes !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: So do you think that these pictures ... Are , are they trying to tell a story ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I mean , like in the case of this young woman , she has lost her clothes , so she rides naked on the horse , she is crying out , Where are they , where are they ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , she is not going to find them lying in the grass like that .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , yeah . Aw , remember the days when you used to go out to the barn , lift up your shirt , and bend over ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_remember the days when you used to go out to the barn , lift up your shirt , and bend over ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You see , now , I would date this girl .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: She is cute , she is outdoorsy , you know , and she knows how to build a fire .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I mean , that is got to come in handy

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , I have got a question . If you had to pick one of us to date , who would it be ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I do not know . Me neither .
